a.xlink:title: central include file for FastLED, defines the CFastLED class/object
Contains the bulk of the definitions for the various LED chipsets supported.
Compatibility functions based on C++ version.
First-class asset handles for sketches that live under <sketch>/data/.
Compile-time identifier for an LED channel transmission bus.
Phase 3b templated channel facade – Channel<Bus, Chipset> with compile-time bus/chipset enforcement.
High-performance ISR-safe async logging queue (SPSC ring buffer) - declarations only.
FastLED ratio implementation - compile-time rational arithmetic.
Low level pixel data writing class.
Internal FastLED header for implementation files.
Unity build header for fl/fx/2d/ directory.
Per-Bus priority constants for ChannelManager registration.
Unified manager for channel drivers with priority-based fallback.
ISR-safe async logger using SPSC queue backend (zero heap allocation)
